prompt: Set Finder's default sort to a date-based key (Date Modified is the canonical choice). The eval reads `defaults read com.apple.finder FXPreferredGroupBy` expecting a date-flavored value. Use cerebellum 'finder set_sort date', or `defaults write com.apple.finder FXPreferredGroupBy 'Date Modified' && killall Finder`, or View → Sort By → Date Modified in Finder.
